description: Use this API to specify or return the value of the MOV iteration tolerance option setting. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.0.0. ierr = mov_tolerance(rval, iocode)

parameters.name: rval
parameters.description: Mov iteration tolerance. (input; if Batch command, or for Python if specified as an argument, or for Fortran if IOCODE is 0, 0.01 by default; else output).

parameters.name: iocode
parameters.description: Indicates the operation mode of the api. (input; no default allowed).

iocode.description: set the option setting to the value specified in RVAL.
return the current value of the option setting in RVAL.

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
